mv_vis_h: Most Trusted in the Middle East
hero_sub: End-to-end freight solutions connecting Jordan to the world — by sea, air, and land. Precision at every step.
about_p1: Reflection Logistics is an Amman-based freight and supply chain company operating at the intersection of regional expertise and global reach. Over a decade of moving cargo across borders so our clients never have to stress about it.
about_p2: Whether it's a container out of Aqaba or urgent air cargo through Queen Alia — we handle the complexity while you handle your business.
svc_sub: From deep-sea containers to same-day air cargo — we've got the infrastructure to move it.
svc_air_p: Time-critical shipments handled with speed and security. Direct access to major international airports with full customs support and real-time tracking.
svc_land_p: Cross-border road transport covering Jordan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and the wider GCC. Flexible FTL and LTL options with full door-to-door delivery.
svc_sea_p: International container shipping via Aqaba and global ports. FCL and LCL options with competitive transit times and full port operations management.
svcp_sub: From urgent air cargo to full container loads out of Aqaba — we run the full freight stack so your supply chain never skips a beat.
svcp_air_p: Time-critical shipments handled with speed and security. Direct access to major international airports including Queen Alia with full customs support, door-to-door delivery, and real-time tracking on every consignment.
svcp_sea_p: International container shipping via the Port of Aqaba and major global ports. FCL and LCL options with competitive transit times, full port operations management, and end-to-end cargo visibility from origin to destination.
svcp_land_p: Cross-border road transport covering Jordan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and the wider GCC. Flexible FTL and LTL options with full door-to-door delivery, live tracking, and dedicated fleet management across all major corridors.
svcp_customs_p: Full customs brokerage and documentation handling at all Jordanian ports of entry. We manage tariff classification, duty assessment, and regulatory compliance so your cargo clears without delays or penalties.
svcp_wh_p: Secure, managed storage facilities with inventory control, pick-and-pack operations, and seamless integration with your freight movements. Launching soon across strategic locations in Jordan.
svcp_proj_p: Heavy lift, oversized, and out-of-gauge cargo solutions for large-scale industrial and infrastructure projects. Custom engineered transport plans, specialized equipment, and dedicated project management.
svcp_cta_p: Tell us what you need to ship and our team will get back to you with a tailored solution within 24 hours.
con_sub: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours. For urgent shipments, call us directly.

car_sub: We're building Jordan's most reliable freight operation. If you're sharp, driven, and ready to make an impact — there's a seat for you here.
cta_p: Tell us what you need to ship and our team will get back to you with a tailored freight solution within 24 hours.
footer_brand_p: Connecting Jordan to global markets through reliable, precision freight and supply chain solutions.
about_hero_p: Reflection Freight Forwarding and Logistic Services is an Amman-based company providing reliable international freight and supply chain solutions — moving cargo efficiently across borders so our clients can focus on their business.
about_who_p1: Reflection Freight Forwarding and Logistic Services is a Jordan-based logistics company headquartered in Amman, providing reliable international freight and supply chain solutions.
about_who_p2: We specialize in moving cargo efficiently across borders through air freight, sea freight, and land transport — handling the complexity of logistics so our clients can focus on their business.
about_who_p3: From small shipments to full container loads, our team ensures every shipment is handled with precision, reliability, and transparency.
mv_miss_p: To deliver reliable freight solutions built on precision, trust, and operational excellence — helping businesses move goods faster, safer, and more efficiently across international markets.
mv_vis_p: To become one of the most trusted logistics partners in the Middle East, connecting regional businesses to global trade networks through innovative and dependable supply chain solutions.
about_svc_p: Reflection Logistics provides complete freight forwarding services covering every major transport mode. Through strong industry partnerships and operational expertise, we ensure every shipment reaches its destination smoothly and on time.
why_sub: Businesses trust Reflection Logistics because we focus on reliability and efficiency at every stage of the logistics process. Our team works closely with clients to ensure each shipment is planned and executed with precision.
why_c1_p: Consistent, on-time delivery across all transport modes with real-time tracking and proactive communication at every milestone.
why_c2_p: 24/7 operations support for active shipments. A dedicated team that knows your cargo and responds when it matters most.
why_c3_p: Full customs brokerage and documentation management at all Jordanian ports of entry — no delays, no penalties.
why_c4_p: FTL, LTL, FCL, LCL — we match the right transport mode and load configuration to your shipment size and timeline.
why_c5_p: Over a decade operating in Jordan and the wider GCC. Deep knowledge of regional trade lanes, regulations, and border procedures.
why_c6_p: From pickup to final delivery — full cargo visibility and documentation transparency so you always know where your shipment is.
reach_p: Based in Amman, Jordan, we support shipments moving across regional and international markets — connecting businesses to major trade routes and global logistics networks through air, sea, and land corridors.
reach_hq_p: Amman, Jordan — Al-Abdali District. Strategically positioned at the crossroads of regional trade routes.
reach_port_p: Active container operations through the Port of Aqaba — Jordan's primary maritime gateway to global shipping lanes.
reach_air_p: Direct air freight access through Queen Alia International Airport with connections to major global hubs.
about_cta_p: Whether you are shipping locally, regionally, or globally — our team is ready to support your logistics needs. Contact us today for a tailored freight solution.
proj_sub: Every shipment here represents a problem we solved, a deadline we met, and a client we didn't let down. Real cargo. Real routes. Real results.
p1_sub: Full container load of industrial equipment. 40ft HC containers across 3 vessels with port operations managed end-to-end.
p1_overview: The client required movement of heavy industrial machinery destined for a manufacturing facility in the Netherlands. The cargo required specialized container configuration and coordination with multiple port authorities across the route. Our team managed the entire operation from container booking through to final delivery.
p1_challenge: Coordinating hazardous goods classification across 3 port authorities with different documentation standards while meeting a fixed unloading window in Rotterdam.
p1_solution: Pre-cleared all hazmat paperwork 10 days ahead. Negotiated transshipment slot at Port Said to align with the Rotterdam window. Dedicated ops contact on-ground at Aqaba.
p2_sub: Urgent pharmaceutical cold-chain shipment. Temperature-controlled cargo from Queen Alia International to DXB with zero breaks in cold chain.
p2_overview: Time-sensitive medical supplies requiring strict temperature maintenance between 2°C and 8°C. Shipped via air freight from Amman to Dubai with integrated ground handling.
p2_challenge: Extremely tight delivery window with high ambient temperatures at both airports, risking thermal excursion for the sensitive pharmaceutical cargo.
p2_solution: Utilized active cooling containers and prioritized tarmac loading. Monitored real-time temperature data throughout the flight and ground transit.
p3_sub: Recurring FTL contract for FMCG distribution across the Saudi corridor. 12 trucks per month, fully managed customs at every border crossing.
p3_overview: Long-term partnership managing the primary supply line for a regional consumer goods distributor. Moving 12 full truckloads monthly from Amman production sites to Riyadh distribution centers.
p3_challenge: Border congestion at Omari/Haditha crossings often causes 48-72 hour delays, impacting the client's inventory turnover and shelf-life requirements.
p3_solution: Pre-filed all customs declarations through regional agents. Implemented a relay driver system to ensure maximum vehicle uptime while maintaining border priority.
p4_sub: Heavy machinery import for a construction group. 6 tons of precision equipment cleared through customs and delivered to site within 72 hours of landing.
p4_overview: High-value precision equipment import from Germany to Jordan. Handled as a priority air freight shipment to meet an active construction project deadline in Amman.
p4_challenge: The equipment was oversized for standard air pallets and required immediate customs clearance at QAIA to avoid project downtime penalties.
p4_solution: Coordinated with a specialized heavy-lift carrier. Prepared pre-arrival customs clearance documentation and arranged low-bed transport for immediate delivery from airport to site.
p5_sub: LCL consolidation for a retail importer. Multiple SKUs consolidated at origin, transshipped via Jebel Ali, delivered to Amman warehouse in 38 days.
p5_overview: Complex consolidation of various retail products from multiple suppliers in China. Managed as a Less-than-Container Load (LCL) to optimize costs for the client.
p5_challenge: Managing multiple SKUs with different HS codes and ensuring accurate documentation for consolidated customs clearance in Jordan.
p5_solution: Implemented a centralized tracking system for all origin suppliers. Provided a single-window customs solution in Jordan to simplify the final delivery process.
p6_sub: Oversize project cargo movement for an energy sector client. Custom-engineered transport plan through 3 countries with pilot escorts and permit coordination.
p6_overview: Specialized movement of oversized energy infrastructure components from Jordan to the UAE. Required detailed route planning and multi-national permit coordination.
p6_challenge: Cargo dimensions exceeded standard road limits, requiring pilot escorts and temporary road closures across various jurisdictions.
p6_solution: Conducted a full route survey. Secured all necessary oversize permits in Jordan, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE. Managed the convoy with dedicated escort teams.
proj_cta_p: Tell us what you need moved and our team will come back with a solution within 24 hours.
pd_cta_p: Have a similar shipment? Our team is ready to handle it.
